name: Chaozhou Three-Circle (Group) Co.,Ltd.
summary: Chaozhou Three-Circle (Group) Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, manufacture, and sale of electronic basic materials, electronic components, and communication devices in China and internationally. The company offers ceramic exterior parts for mobiles, ceramic covers for fingerprint modules, and ceramic parts for smart wearable devices; piezo micro dispensing systems; ceramic components for fiber optic communication products; ceramic metallizations; anode supported solid oxide fuel cell (SOFC) cells and SOFC electrolyte membranes; fixed resistors and multilayer ceramic chip capacitors; ceramic substrates; ceramic capillary products, fashion ceramics, ceramic knife sets, mechanical ceramics, and ceramic bearings; and lithium battery cover assembly products and hermetic terminals for compressors. Its products are used in optical communications, electronics, electrical, machinery, energy conservation and environmental protection, new energy, biological, and fashion applications. The company was founded in 1970 and is headquartered in Chaozhou, China.
